sections.paragraph:
, once חֶרֶם ( Zec 14:11), with suffix חֶרְמִי, חֶרְמֹו pl. חֲרָמִים.

(1) a net, of a fisherman or fowler, so called from shutting, see the root No. 1, Hab 1:16, 17 Hab 1:17 Eze 26:5, 14 Eze 26:14 47:10 . Metaph. nets are used of the blandishments of women, Ecc 7:26.

(2) the devoting of any thing to utter destruction, Mal. 3:24 Zec 14:11. אִישׁ חֶרְמִי a man devoted by me, 1Ki 20:42 Isa 34:5.
